specific_location: West side of Spinney Mountain Reservoir
description: These birds were identified after the fact, see comments.   Buffy underneath. Buff tan head. Long wings in flight. Tail with white tips on corners visible on photo. Lesser coverts white contasting with rest of wing, the character to look for in longspurs in flight to separate SMLO along with the tail pattern if seen from other longspur species. Rufous visible on inner primaries.Behaviors: I flushed these birds along with a couple others and they flew a good distance before coming down. I went to try to get a photograph of them perched but I didnt see them again.Call: They called but see comments as to why I don't remember the call.Plumage: 1st winter
